channel.title: Lildebi on Guardian Project
channel.description: Recent content in Lildebi on Guardian Project

item.title: Complete, reproducible app distribution achieved!
item.description: With F-Droid, we have been working towards getting a complete app distribution channel that is able to reproducibly build each Android app from source. while this may sound like a mundane detail, it does provide lots of tangible benefits. First, it means that anyone can verify that the app that they are using is 100% built from the source code, with nothing else added. That verifies that the app is indeed 100% free, open source software.
